parents.subject: LU-19545 ec: tight binding parity mirror to data mirror

commit.subject: LU-19877 mgs: wait all exports to complete
commit.message:
LU-19877 mgs: wait all exports to complete

In mgs_device_fini, there could be some pending obd_export
which is held by some incoming request, then it need to wait
there exports to complete before disconnecting the bottom obd.

Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ib2ddf3bf094c11456bab9cebd796357bfe671947
